full_text:
Wang Su (Ziyong) 王肅 (子雍)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Su (王肅), styledZiyong (子雍). A commentator on the classics and a close aide to Sima Shi. Wang Su was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wang Su lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
